concept_name: Lorentz Force on a Moving Charged Particle (F = q v × B)
source_book: DC Pandey Vol 2 Ch.26 §26.2 (force on a moving charge in a magnetic field) — table-of-contents reference only; teaching authored from first principles. Diamond #2 of the magnetism chapter (M1, archetype B — force-in-field). RULE 31 CONVERSION (2026-07-02, from the 2026-07-01 live-instrument prototype): restructured from 8 reveal states into 4 teacher-driven live bookmarks across 2 views — a 'Motion' view (the path: straight/circle/helix as the teacher drags θ) and a 'Direction' view (the charge frozen so the v/B/F vectors + 3D right-hand can be studied). Per-state contextual controls (Rule 31c): S1 θ only, S2 v+B (r = mv/qB live), S3 q+θ, S4 explore = all. The atomic concept: direction (F ⊥ both v and B via the right-hand rule, reverses for −q) and magnitude (F = |q|vB sin θ, max at 90°, zero when v ∥ B); the deep insight is F ⊥ v always → no work → |v| conserved → a circle (or helix).

real_world_anchor.primary: Picture an old CRT television your grandparents kept in the corner of the living room — the kind with a deep glass back. Inside, an electron beam shoots from the back of the tube toward the front screen. Magnetic deflection coils around the neck of the tube create a B-field that steers the beam — line by line, top to bottom — across the phosphor screen so you see a picture. Without F = qv × B, the beam would land on one fixed spot and the screen would show only a dot.
real_world_anchor.secondary: Picture the night sky over the Arctic during a geomagnetic storm — green and purple curtains of aurora light. Those colours come from solar-wind protons that smashed into Earth's magnetic field. The Lorentz force curved each proton along the field lines, funneling them down toward the poles. ISRO's satellites in low Earth orbit measure these particle streams continuously; the curving path is F = qv × B in real time.
real_world_anchor.tertiary: Picture BARC's variable-energy cyclotron in Kolkata. Inside the vacuum chamber, a strong vertical B-field bends accelerated protons into a spiral path. Each lap, an alternating voltage gives them a kick of energy; the radius widens, the period stays the same, the proton spirals outward until it hits the target. The whole spiral is just the Lorentz force on a moving charge — the same physics as the CRT, just at MeV energies.

q_sign.name: Sign of the charge (positive or negative)

B.name: Magnitude of the uniform magnetic field

formulas.lorentz_force_vector: F = q (v × B) — F is perpendicular to both v and B; the cross product gives the direction (right-hand rule), q gives the sign.
formulas.lorentz_force_magnitude: F = |q| v B sin θ — maximum when v ⊥ B (θ = 90°), zero when v ∥ B (θ = 0° or 180°).
formulas.no_work_done: F · v = q (v × B) · v = 0 for every v. Magnetic force never changes kinetic energy; |v| is constant.
formulas.cyclotron_radius: r = m v_perp / (|q| B), where v_perp = v sin θ. The particle's circular component of motion has this radius.
formulas.cyclotron_period: T = 2π m / (|q| B). Independent of v — every charge of the same q/m takes the same time per loop.

constraints: B must be uniform — non-uniform fields produce more complex motion (e.g., magnetic mirrors).
Particle must be non-relativistic — at v close to c, the mass increases and r grows accordingly.
When v ∥ B (θ = 0), the cross product is zero — particle moves in a straight line, no force.
Cyclotron period T = 2π m / (|q| B) depends only on charge-to-mass ratio and B, not on v or r.
Magnetic force ALWAYS does zero work — speed |v| is conserved exactly, only direction changes.

aha_moment.statement: F is perpendicular to BOTH v and B. Cross product, never along either.
aha_moment.visual_confirmation: On the circle bookmark, F always points to the centre and the equally-spaced trail proves the speed never changes (no work). Drag θ down from 90° and the circle opens into a helix — F stays at 90° to v the whole way.

scene_composition.text: θ = 0° — v is parallel to B

Uniform field B (blue arrows).
Electric field E = 0.
Orange arrow = v.

Lorentz force:
F = qE + q v×B
E = 0 → F = q v×B
θ = 0 → sin 0° = 0 → F = 0. The proton drifts straight. Drag θ to bend it.

tts_sentences.text_en: Setup. The blue arrows are a uniform magnetic field B. There is no electric field here — electric field E is zero.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Setup देखते हैं। ये blue arrows एक uniform magnetic field B दिखाते हैं। यहाँ कोई electric field नहीं है — electric field E zero है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Setup చూద్దాం. ఈ blue arrows ఒక uniform magnetic field B చూపిస్తున్నాయి. ఇక్కడ electric field లేదు — electric field E zero.

tts_sentences.text_en: The orange arrow is the proton's velocity v. Right now velocity v points along magnetic field B, so the angle theta is zero.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Orange arrow proton की velocity v है। अभी velocity v, magnetic field B के साथ point कर रहा है, इसलिए angle theta zero है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Orange arrow proton యొక్క velocity v. ఇప్పుడు velocity v, magnetic field B వెంట point చేస్తోంది, కాబట్టి angle theta zero.

tts_sentences.text_en: With electric field E zero, the force is q v B sine theta. At theta zero, sine zero is zero — so force F is zero.
tts_sentences.text_hi: electric field E zero होने पर, force है q v B sine theta। Theta zero पर, sine zero zero है — तो force F zero है।
tts_sentences.text_te: electric field E zero అయినప్పుడు, force అంటే q v B sine theta. Theta zero వద్ద, sine zero zero — కాబట్టి force F zero.

tts_sentences.text_en: So the proton just drifts in a straight line. Now drag the angle slider to tilt v and watch it bend.
tts_sentences.text_hi: तो proton बस एक straight line में drift करता है। अब angle slider को drag करके v को tilt करो और इसे bend होते देखो।
tts_sentences.text_te: కాబట్టి proton straight line లో drift చేస్తుంది. ఇప్పుడు angle slider drag చేసి v ని tilt చేసి bend అవడం చూడండి.

scene_composition.text: θ = 90° — pure perpendicular, F at max

θ = 90° → F = qvB (max)
Full circle, no drift along B

Radius r = mv / (qB)
Period  T = 2π m / (qB)
Trail dots stay equally spaced → the speed never changes (no work). Why? — next lesson.

tts_sentences.text_en: Now velocity v is perpendicular to magnetic field B. The force is at its maximum, and the path closes into a perfect circle.
tts_sentences.text_hi: अब velocity v, magnetic field B के perpendicular है। force अपने maximum पर है, और path एक perfect circle में बंद हो जाती है।
tts_sentences.text_te: ఇప్పుడు velocity v, magnetic field B కు perpendicular. force దాని maximum వద్ద ఉంది, మరియు path ఒక perfect circle గా మూసుకుంటుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: Force F always points to the centre — it is the centripetal force that keeps the proton turning.
tts_sentences.text_hi: force F हमेशा centre की तरफ point करता है — यही centripetal force है जो proton को घुमाती रहती है।
tts_sentences.text_te: force F ఎల్లప్పుడూ centre వైపు point చేస్తుంది — ఇదే proton ని తిప్పే centripetal force.

tts_sentences.text_en: For exams: radius r equals m v over q B, and period T equals two pi m over q B — the same time every lap.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Exam के लिए: radius r equals m v over q B, और period T equals two pi m over q B — हर lap same time।
tts_sentences.text_te: Exam కోసం: radius r equals m v over q B, మరియు period T equals two pi m over q B — ప్రతి lap same time.

tts_sentences.text_en: You might expect the field to speed the proton up. But watch the trail dots — equally spaced, so the speed never changes. A magnetic force only steers; why is the next lesson.
tts_sentences.text_hi: तुम expect कर सकते हो कि field proton को speed up कर देगी। पर trail dots देखो — बराबर दूरी पर, तो speed कभी नहीं बदलती। Magnetic force सिर्फ steer करती है; क्यों — अगला lesson।
tts_sentences.text_te: Field proton ని speed up చేస్తుందని మీరు expect చేయవచ్చు. కానీ trail dots చూడండి — సమాన దూరంలో, కాబట్టి speed ఎప్పుడూ మారదు. Magnetic force steer మాత్రమే చేస్తుంది; ఎందుకో — తదుపరి lesson.

tts_sentences.text_en: Try it. Drag the speed v — the circle grows, but the period stays the same. Drag the field B — the circle tightens.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Try करो। Speed v को drag करो — circle बड़ा होता है, लेकिन period same रहता है। Field B को drag करो — circle tight हो जाता है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Try చేయండి. Speed v ని drag చేయండి — circle పెద్దదవుతుంది, కానీ period same గా ఉంటుంది. Field B ని drag చేయండి — circle tight అవుతుంది.

misconception_watch.belief: A magnetic field can speed up a charged particle — a stronger field makes it go faster.
misconception_watch.one_line_fix: Never. F · v = 0 by construction, so the work is zero. A bigger B makes a TIGHTER circle, not a faster particle. Only an electric field can change |v|.

STATE_3.title: The right-hand rule — F ⊥ v and B

scene_composition.text: The right-hand rule — F ⊥ both v and B

Point fingers along v.
Curl them toward B.
Your thumb gives F.

F = q (v × B).
A cross product — F is
perpendicular to BOTH,
never along v, never along B.
Tap the charge button: flip to −q and F flips to the opposite side. Drag θ to see F shrink.

tts_sentences.text_en: Now we freeze the charge so we can study the directions. This is the right-hand rule.
tts_sentences.text_hi: अब हम charge को freeze करते हैं ताकि directions को study कर सकें। यह right-hand rule है।
tts_sentences.text_te: ఇప్పుడు charge ని freeze చేస్తాం, directions ని study చేయడానికి. ఇది right-hand rule.

tts_sentences.text_en: Point your fingers along velocity v.
tts_sentences.text_hi: अपनी fingers को velocity v की दिशा में point करो।
tts_sentences.text_te: మీ fingers ని velocity v వెంట point చేయండి.

tts_sentences.text_en: Curl them toward magnetic field B.
tts_sentences.text_hi: उन्हें magnetic field B की तरफ curl करो।
tts_sentences.text_te: వాటిని magnetic field B వైపు curl చేయండి.

tts_sentences.text_en: Your thumb now gives the force F — perpendicular to both velocity v and magnetic field B.
tts_sentences.text_hi: अब तुम्हारा thumb force F देता है — velocity v और magnetic field B दोनों के perpendicular।
tts_sentences.text_te: మీ thumb ఇప్పుడు force F ని ఇస్తుంది — velocity v మరియు magnetic field B రెండింటికీ perpendicular.

tts_sentences.text_en: Force F is a cross product, so it is never along velocity v and never along magnetic field B.
tts_sentences.text_hi: force F एक cross product है, इसलिए यह कभी velocity v के साथ नहीं और कभी magnetic field B के साथ नहीं होता।
tts_sentences.text_te: force F ఒక cross product, కాబట్టి ఇది ఎప్పుడూ velocity v వెంట కాదు, ఎప్పుడూ magnetic field B వెంట కాదు.

tts_sentences.text_en: Flip the charge to negative and the force flips to the opposite side. Same rule, opposite thumb.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Charge को negative करो और force opposite side पर flip हो जाता है। Same rule, opposite thumb।
tts_sentences.text_te: Charge ని negative కి flip చేయండి మరియు force opposite వైపు flip అవుతుంది. Same rule, opposite thumb.

scene_composition.text: θ = 45° — tilt back from the circle

F = qvB · sin 45° ≈ 0.71 × max
(less than the full circle)

The closed circle OPENS into a helix —
part of v now drifts along B
F scales as sin θ. Drag θ from 0° to 90° and watch it morph: straight → helix → circle. The sin θ is just the slice of v perpendicular to B.

tts_sentences.text_en: Now tilt velocity v back to forty-five degrees. The path is no longer a closed circle — it opens into a helix.
tts_sentences.text_hi: अब velocity v को forty-five degrees पर tilt करो। Path अब closed circle नहीं है — यह एक helix में खुल जाती है।
tts_sentences.text_te: ఇప్పుడు velocity v ను forty-five degrees కు tilt చేయండి. Path ఇప్పుడు closed circle కాదు — ఇది helix గా తెరుచుకుంటుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: Force F has dropped to seventy-one percent of its maximum. Sine forty-five is about zero point seven one.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Force F, अपने maximum का seventy-one percent रह गया है। Sine forty-five करीब zero point seven one है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Force F, దీని maximum లో seventy-one percent కు తగ్గింది. Sine forty-five దాదాపు zero point seven one.

tts_sentences.text_en: Why a helix? Part of velocity v points along magnetic field B and drifts forward, while the rest circles around magnetic field B.
tts_sentences.text_hi: Helix क्यों? velocity v का एक हिस्सा magnetic field B के साथ point करता है और forward drift करता है, जबकि बाकी magnetic field B के चारों तरफ circle करता है।
tts_sentences.text_te: Helix ఎందుకు? velocity v లో ఒక భాగం magnetic field B వెంట point చేసి forward drift చేస్తుంది, మిగిలినది magnetic field B చుట్టూ circle చేస్తుంది.

tts_sentences.text_en: Now you drive it. Drag the angle theta from zero to ninety and watch the path morph from straight to helix to circle. Flip the charge to reverse the sense.
tts_sentences.text_hi: अब तुम चलाओ। Angle theta को zero से ninety तक drag करो और path को straight से helix से circle में morph होते देखो। Charge flip करके sense reverse करो।
tts_sentences.text_te: ఇప్పుడు మీరు నడపండి. Angle theta ను zero నుండి ninety వరకు drag చేసి path straight నుండి helix నుండి circle గా morph అవడం చూడండి. Charge flip చేసి sense reverse చేయండి.

misconception_watch.belief: F = qvB sin θ is a formula to memorise, with sin θ as an arbitrary correction.
misconception_watch.one_line_fix: sin θ is just |v_⊥| / |v|. The formula is really F = q v_⊥ B — only the slice of v perpendicular to B creates the force; the part along B drifts freely and makes the helix.

STATE_2.label: The circle — θ = 90°, F to the centre, no work [Motion]

STATE_3.label: Right-hand rule — charge frozen, study v/B/F + hand [Direction]

STATE_4.label: The helix — θ = 45°, the circle opens [Motion]
